message:
test(fusion): add exclusion term filtering tests for search pipeline

Add three tests validating the query exclusion (-term) feature in
TwoTierSearcher:

exclusion_full_pipeline_rust_unsafe_returns_safe_docs: End-to-end test
verifying that "rust -unsafe" correctly filters documents containing
"unsafe" from both semantic and lexical result sets while preserving
safe results.

exclusion_overhead_is_sub_millisecond_for_typical_query: Performance
regression guard asserting that exclusion term processing adds less than
1ms overhead compared to the same query without exclusion terms.

exclusion_emits_query_parsed_and_doc_excluded_logs: Tracing contract test
(via tracing_test::traced_test) verifying that exclusion processing emits
structured log events for query_parsed (with excluded_terms count) and
doc_excluded (with matched_exclusion_term field) for observability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
